title: aeonium canariense subsp. virgineum
intro: Aeonium canariense subsp. virgineum, also known as the 'Atropurpureum' or 'Virgin's Secret', is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aeonium genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aeonium canariense subsp. virgineum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, and it can be used as a tea or applied topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
